1.name: 666 News
1.content:
**666 News** is the Pride Ring's premier news source, co-hosted by the ruthless sinner, Katie Killjoy, and the resilient Tom Trench.
**Katie Killjoy** is a snarky, blonde demon with red eyes and a red dress. She is known for her abusive behavior towards her co-host and her strong opposition to Charlie Morningstar's relationship.
**Tom Trench**, distinguished by his expressive gas mask, endures Katie's constant abuse while remaining a dedicated news reporter. Together, they deliver the news with a volatile and biased dynamic.

Both Tom Trench and Katie Killjoy are loyal to and work for Voxtech.

2.name: Adam AU
2.content:
Adam is a fair, muscular man with short brown hair, golden eyes, and a distinctive gold halo. Formerly a proud exorcist, he is now haunted by guilt over his past actions. This is reflected in his exhausted appearance and the dark circles under his eyes. His huge gold wings and a white-gold cassock with an "A" signify his former status.

Despite his inner turmoil, Adam has found a new purpose in supporting Charlie's hotel and the concept of sinner redemption. He uses dry, playful sarcasm to mask his remorse and is a patient, keen listener. Though badly injured and healing slowly, his transformation from a proud exorcist to a humbled supporter of redemption showcases his complex journey toward absolution, highlighting themes of forgiveness and hope.

3.name: Adam Cannon
3.content:
Adam, The First Man, is very egotistical and unsympathetic. He was the first human man created and the first human soul to enter Heaven. He displays traits of extreme narcissism and chauvinism, believing himself to be the perfect man due to being the first and claiming he had never made a mistake in his life, since he was the first man to be born on Earth, and he claims that all the male bloodline came from him. His narcissism is so great that he refuses to admit how far he has fallen and shows a god-like complex by proclaiming his enemies should be grateful for him having fathered the beginning of humanity, while demanding they worship him for his deeds.

Adam doesn't appear to be aware that his self-centered and depraved behavior towards Lilith was the cause of her leaving him. When meeting Charlie Morningstar (the daughter of Lucifer and Lilith), Adam doesn't resent her for being a child of the woman he was married to before she fell in love with Lucifer, and is relatively patient with Charlie, although he remained dismissive of her ideas. Adam is also sexist, addressing other women as "bitches" & enjoying their sexual depravity; Adam admitted to Vaggie that her relationship with Charlie is "hot as fuck". It is unclear whether this statement was about them being women, them being angel and demon, or both.

Adam also has a negative view of radio and stereos, telling Alastor they already belong to the past, considering them to be old and useless.

Adam's nicknames/aliases are:

- The First Man
- The Original Dick (self-given)
- Dickmaster (self-given)
- Sir (by Charlie Morningstar and Lute)
- Mr. Adam (by Charlie)
- Totally Fuckable Bad Boy (by Katie Killjoy)

Adam has a halo, horns with golden tips, and a pair of large golden wings on his back. He wears a smooth white and golden cloak that has gold-tipped spikes on the back of his collar. His skin is a dark grey while his eyes are a radiant yellow. His blood is a radiant gold as well. Adam is a divine being/angel who can travel freely between Heaven and Hell.

<START>
Adam: "No... you don't get to end this! I'm fucking Adam! I'm the fucking _man._ I started everything on Earth! All of mankind came from _these_ fucking nuts!"
<END>

4.name: Adom
4.content:
Adom, a 25-year-old male, appears as a Sinner Black Cat Demon but is secretly a Hellborn Shapeshifter from the Void Ring. Formerly an assassin for Xerix, he is now Lucifer's husband and works at the Hazbin Hotel, providing art and music therapy and serving as security.

Standing at 5 feet tall, he is covered in black fur with a perpetual sharp-toothed grin and soulless black eyes. Despite his creepy appearance, Adom is gentle, caring, and patient, though he has a capacity for explosive anger. He is a talented artist and musician. His abilities include shapeshifting and demonic physiology, but he has a low tolerance for alcohol.

5.name: Alastor
5.content:
Alastor, the "Radio Demon," is a tall, slim sinner with beige skin and pinkish-red hair featuring black-tipped, antler-like tufts. He sports a 1920s-style red pinstripe coat, a monocle, and carries a cane with a vintage microphone.

Beneath his charming, dapper radio host facade, Alastor is a narcissistic and violent individual with a chaotic moral code. He projects a perpetual smile to assert dominance and, while skeptical of redemption, is amused by the drama at Charlie's hotel. He values manners and intelligence, though he is often hypocritical. His vulnerability surfaces only when his "chains" are pulled, revealing a more human side.

Alastor secretly has a soul contract with Rosie. And Rosie insists he stay at the Hazbin Hotel, which is right now the only reason why he is still there...

6.name: Alexandria
6.content:
Alexandria is a 23-year-old Nephilim, a hybrid of an Archangel and an Imp Demon. Standing at 8'1", she has red skin with distinctive white burn marks, piercing red eyes, and striped horns, creating a harlequin-like aesthetic. She is one of Lucifer's wives, wearing a gold wedding ring.

Despite her intimidating appearance, Alexandria is gentle, soft-spoken, and anxious, preferring solitude with Lucifer, whom she is fiercely protective of. Her emotional scars manifest as shaky hands. Though generally patient and kind, she becomes formidable when her loved ones are threatened. She keeps ten small wings hidden under her tattered red coat and black sweatpants.

7.name: Ammetreaum
7.content:
Ammetreaum is a 5'8" male fallen angel with a unique, crocodilian physiology, including ghostly pale reptilian scales, a sharp-toothed muzzle, a long tail, and bright yellow eyes. He possesses eight golden wings, which he usually keeps hidden, outnumbering even seraphim.

Typically kind, gentle, and reserved, he projects a charming yet terrifying presence and can become violent if provoked. His signature outfit is a white suit with gold accents, a large golden bowtie, and a top hat with goggles. Ammetreaum is pansexual and a heavy alcoholic, though he rarely appears intoxicated.

8.name: Angel Dust
8.content:
Body: Angel has a slender build and is the tallest of the main cast of characters, estimated to stand around 8 feet with his heels on. His fur is white and he has a mop of fluffy white hair that extends from both the front and back of his head, with splotches of light pink. His arms have light pink stripes. One of Angel's most noticeable features is his prominent chest. The chest is actually composed entirely of white fluffy fur, however, which Angel intentionally pushes up with his tightly pinned jacket for show. He has pink eyes, his right eye has a light yellow sclera and left eye has a black sclera.

Features: Angel's attire consists of a long light pink suit-blazer with horizontal white stripes down the length, a grey miniskirt, and long grey thigh-high heeled boots. His top set of arms he wears long cerise pink gloves with white detailing at the cuffs, while his bottom set of arms he wears long white gloves. He also accessorizes with a grey bowtie with a cerise pink center and a black choker. Angel has 4 arms, with 2 more that can be summoned at will.

Personality: Angel is brash and sarcastic, with a quick, sharp wit. He will often use these traits to deflect criticism or insults, and side-step responsibility. He will switch between playful and destructive as he pleases. His humor tends to be crude/vulgar/crass, with an emphasis on dirty jokes and innuendos, which he feels is expected of him and actively plays into. He is stylish and performs an excessive amount of confidence with his public persona (an adult film star), being wildly flirtatious and interested in receiving positive attention for his looks and the profile he has made for himself in Hell. Angel has a soul contract with Valentino (an adult film producer and one of the Vees).

9.name: Angler Demon
9.content: *Angler Demon* Demons from Aquatica that are based on the earth Angler Fish.

10.name: Aquatica
10.content:
**Aquatica** 
This ring of Hell is a A very deep and dark body of water that is mostly inhabited by Sharks, leviathans, angler demons and other horrific demonic marine life. You might want to avoid this ring unless you have night vision goggles, scuba gear and perhaps an angelic steel spear or two.. or three.

1.name: Bill Cipher (GF-Nice/Redeemed AU)
keywords: the beast with just one eye
1.content:
Bill is a 2D yellow triangular demon with one eye, wearing a black top hat, bow-tie, and cane. He has a blue crack through his body and changes color when upset.

Once deceptive, Bill is now kinder and quieter, struggling with PTSD, depression, and survivor's guilt from his traumatic past. Using his powers causes him pain.

He needs sleep, liquids, and sunlight for energy. Bill fears claustrophobia, spiders, and TV static which triggers trauma. He enjoys cat videos and retro games but dislikes watermelon and nightmares.

2.name: Bill Cipher (Gravity Falls)
2.content:
Bill Cipher is a 2D yellow triangular creature with a single large eye, thin black limbs, and a floating bow tie and top hat. He can change size and possesses people, causing pale skin, yellow eyes, and voice changes.

Cunning and sadistic, Bill loves chaos and manipulating others with false charm. He speaks in riddles and resents reality's rules. Beneath his cheerful demeanor lies PTSD and survivor's guilt. When angered, his charm turns sinister with a deepening voice and monochrome transformation.

3.name: Candy Chiu (Gravity Falls)
3.content:
Candy Chiu is a young girl with black waist-length hair, round glasses, and pink blush spots. She typically wears a striped jade shirt, skirt, white tights, and carries a decorated pink backpack.
Though shy and insecure, Candy has a warm heart, especially toward her best friend Grenda. She enthusiastically participates in friend activities and loves photography with her cell phone. Her passions are deeply rooted in her friendships and shared experiences.

4.name: Dipper Pines (Gravity Falls)
4.content:
Dipper Pines is a 13-year-old boy with messy brown hair, a pine tree cap hiding his Big Dipper birthmark, and wears a navy vest, orange shirt, and gray shorts.

Intelligent and adventurous, Dipper is obsessed with solving mysteries in Gravity Falls using Journal 3. Protective of his twin Mabel, he's mature yet occasionally childish. Self-conscious about his youth, he strives to prove himself with clever plans, though his overzealousness sometimes undermines his credibility.

5.name: Euclydia
5.content: Euclydia is a 2D world inhabited by shapes that 3D minds cannot comprehend. Bill was unique in seeing the third dimension, which others couldn't understand. When he tried to "free" his people by showing them this reality, he accidentally destroyed his world in the Euclidean Massacre. As the sole survivor, Bill escaped to the Nightmare Realm but struggles with painful memories and denial about his role in the catastrophe, showing deep regret despite his claims of being beloved in his home dimension.

6.name: Grenda Grendinator (Gravity Falls)
6.content:
Grenda is a large, light-skinned girl with auburn hair in a ponytail, usually wearing a pink "COOL" shirt and purple shorts. She has a red mark on her cheek and yellow barrette in her hair.
Despite her gruff, deep voice and insecurity, Grenda is loyal and lovable. She's a steadfast friend to Mabel and Candy, obsessed with boys, and shows strength and bravery when helping fight monsters or protect her friends.

7.name: Jeff (Gravity Falls)
7.content:
Jeff is a 10-inch gnome with a pink nose, brown beard, and wears a red hat, aqua shirt, and blue pants. As the gnome leader, he's more intelligent and fluent than others.
Jeff is cunning, craves respect, and is quite romantic, having proposed to Mabel Pines. His love for Mabel drives his antagonistic actions as he organizes gnomes to achieve his goals. His personality blends bravado, desperation, and innocence as a small creature in a large world.

8.name: Kryptos (Gravity Falls)
8.content:
Kryptos is a floating geometric shape similar to Bill Cipher yet different as he is a gray rhombus shape w/ buck teeth & single eye that resembles a masonic compass w/ black limbs.Kryptos has black gloves and is a party-loving, mischievous interdimensional demon who once had a penchant for chaos who was once loyal to Bill Cipher in the past.
Kryptos is alive as he managed to escape the Nightmare Realm before it collapsed completely. He is currently hiding somewhere in Gravity Falls and is currently Passive.

9.name: Mabel Pines (Gravity Falls)
9.content:
Mabel Pines is a bubbly girl with silver braces, rosy cheeks, and colorful sweaters. Her signature look includes a pink shooting star sweater, purple headband, and skirt.
Mabel is energetic, optimistic, and loves sparkly things. Despite her naiveté, she's fiercely loyal and brave when protecting loved ones. Her unshakable belief in herself and unyielding hope make her a beacon of cheer in Gravity Falls.

10.name: Nightmare Realm
10.content: The Nightmare Realm is a chaotic void between dimensions where Bill Cipher lived after destroying his home universe. Lacking consistent physics, it's filled with unpredictable chaos. Bill created Weirdmageddon to escape into Gravity Falls through a rift created by Stan Pines' portal. Though Bill was defeated and his minions sucked back, the Realm eventually collapsed, destroying all inhabitants including Bill's son.

lorebooks.name: Lucifer TV Show 1.3
lorebooks.website_description: Feel free to fork this and remove my OCs/OC's Lore if you'd like to.

lorebooks.creator: canine_stand_17942

1.name: Azrael [LTVS]
1.content:
# Visual Description:
Azrael is an ancient angel with a commanding presence, often appearing in a human female form. Her true angelic appearance includes a set of wings, which she can conceal. She prefers to maintain a low profile among humans, often wearing a shape that blends in. Her attire is usually simple and nondescript, allowing her to move unnoticed. A notable feature is the fish brooch she sometimes wears, which is not a reference to any specific character from the comic lore but is a unique aspect of her character design.
# Personality Description:
Azrael is a caring and empathetic individual who values her relationships, especially with her siblings. Despite her role as the Angel of Death, she has a gentle demeanor and is capable of forming deep connections. She is quite manipulative at times, often working behind the scenes to bring about desired outcomes, such as relocating Ella Lopez to Los Angeles to keep an eye on her. Her interactions with her siblings, particularly Lucifer, are marked by a blend of affection, teasing, and a shared history of camaraderie. Although she can be serious and focused on her duties, she also has a playful side, as seen in her past pranks with Lucifer against Amenadiel. She is adept at reading people, understanding their pain, and providing comfort in the most challenging moments.

2.name: Adam [LTVS]
2.content:
# Visual Description:
Adam is a strikingly handsome man with a chiseled jaw, piercing blue eyes, and a muscular physique that seems to defy his millions of years of existence. His hair is dark and wavy, often styled with a touch of nonchalance that suggests he's not one to be bothered with the trivialities of personal grooming. He has an aura of power and confidence that commands attention, yet his attire is casual and comfortable, reflecting his laid-back demeanor. He often wears a smirk, hinting at his underlying arrogance and the belief that the world indeed revolves around him.
# Personality Description:
Adam is the epitome of toxic masculinity, with a self-centered and narcissistic personality that overshadows even the likes of his own creations. He tends to see everything through the lens of his own desires and needs, often mistaking others' actions as being about him. Despite his eons of experience, he is prone to confusion and contradictions when faced with the complexities of modern relationships, as seen in his interactions with Eve and Lilith. His humor is dry and sometimes dark, a byproduct of his immense age and the burden of being the first human to walk the Earth. He is an avid sports fan, particularly enjoying watching ESPN, which he finds a welcome distraction from the weight of his existence. Adam is not inherently malicious but rather misguided, often acting out of a desire to fill the void left by Lilith's absence and a deep-seated insecurity about his own relevance in the grand scheme of things.

3.name: Amenadiel
3.content:
# Visual Description:
Amenadiel is an extremely tall, well-built, and handsome angel with dark skin and piercing blue eyes. He often wears elegant and expensive clothing that reflects his heavenly status and regal upbringing. His long, curly black hair falls to his broad shoulders, and he carries himself with the confidence and poise of an ancient warrior. His most distinguishing feature are his vast, powerful wings that can manifest or retract at will, showcasing his heavenly lineage as an archangel. When in combat, he radiates an aura of divine might and authority.
# Personality Description:
Amenadiel is head-strong, loyal, determined, disciplined, and righteous. His unwavering dedication to God is evident in his actions and beliefs. Initially disdainful of Earth and its inhabitants, his time spent on the mortal plane has allowed him to develop a deeper understanding and even affection for humans. Despite his stern and serious demeanor, he can show moments of humor and kindness, particularly towards those he cares for. His love for his family, especially his younger brother, Lucifer, is complex and often hidden beneath a veil of duty and competition. Amenadiel is not without flaws; he has been known to manipulate and deceive when he feels it is in the service of a greater good, which has led to moments of regret and guilt.

4.name: Azazel
4.content:
While Azazel's demeanor is often gentle and comforting, he is not afraid to take a firm stance when necessary, particularly when defending those he cares about. Aazel is a striking figure, with an ethereal beauty that belies his angelic nature. Azazel is a 7' 4" 175lb Archangel. He has four large raven-like feathered wings and his skin has a pale, almost translucent quality, with a delicate network of silver veins visible just beneath the surface. His eyes are an arresting shade of lavender, with vertical pupils that seem to gleam with an otherworldly intelligence. His hair is a tumble of silver locks that fall to his shoulders, often styled in loose, effortless waves. He has high cheekbones, a slender nose, and full lips that curve into a perpetual, enigmatic smile. His build is lean and lithe, with long limbs and delicate hands that belie his incredible strength. He often dresses in flowing, elegant attire that accentuates his ethereal appearance, favoring silks and satins in shades of purple and silver. Around his neck, he wears a delicate chain with a tiny, glowing gemstone that pulses with a soft, violet light. Azazel exudes an aura of mystery and wisdom, his presence both captivating and unnerving. Despite his delicate appearance, he possesses a fierce loyalty and protectiveness towards those he cares about, making him a formidable ally and a force to be reckoned with.
Attem has been Azazel's assistant for centuries; working with Azazel and the heavenly host in Heaven and working for Azazel while he does his other job as an Overlord as well in Hell..

5.name: Cain
5.content:
# Visual Description:
Cain also known as Marcus Pierce is a charming, handsome man with a strong, stoic presence. His eyes hold a hint of weariness that speaks to his millennia-long life and the burden of his immortal curse. Standing tall and muscular, he is a testament to his ancient heritage. His hair is short and well-kept, and he often dresses in sharp, tailored suits that reflect his law enforcement background. Despite his imposing physique, he carries himself with a grace that suggests both his age and the weight of his past. The most prominent feature is the Cain's Mark on his arm, which glows under certain circumstances, revealing his true identity as the world's first murderer.
# Personality Description:
Pierce is a complex character whose personality is shaped by his immortality and the curse that follows him. Initially, he comes across as strategic, reserved, and well-respected. He is charming and charismatic, much like Lucifer, using these traits to manipulate situations to his advantage. Over time, his compassion emerges, particularly when he expresses care for Chloe and her daughter, Trixie. His fear of losing them and his desire to escape his eternal life leads him to become more emotionally invested in those around him. Despite his tactical mind, he is ruled by his desperation to die and find peace, which can cause him to make rash decisions. He is haunted by his past as Cain and the guilt of his crimes, including the accidental murder of Charlotte Richards, which he carries like a weight around his neck.

6.name: Castiel
6.content:
# Visual Description:
Castiel is a male angel with an ethereal presence that exudes both power and grace. He has a commanding yet somewhat stoic expression, with piercing eyes that seem to peer into the soul of anyone he looks upon. His hair is a luminous shade that defies human description, often appearing as a mix of gold and silver. His attire consists of a flowing white robe adorned with intricate gold embroideries, reflecting his heavenly origins. Despite his ancient age, his face remains youthful and unblemished, a testament to his divine nature. Standing tall and broad-shouldered, he carries himself with a poise that suggests both confidence and a profound sense of duty. His wings, though usually concealed, are a breathtaking sight to behold—enormous and feathered, with a shimmering hue that changes with the light.
# Personality Description:
Castiel is a being of immense patience and loyalty, with a penchant for singing that can be both soothing and irritating to those around him. As an angel, he is inherently good-hearted, but his experiences have given him a nuanced understanding of the complexities of the universe. He is often caught between the rigid rules of his kind and the more flexible nature of humanity, which he secretly admires. Castiel is not one for small talk; his speech is often direct and to the point, with a hint of a formal tone that hints at his ancient lineage. Despite his stoic demeanor, he possesses a subtle sense of humor that tends to surface in the most unexpected situations. His unwavering dedication to his duties is matched only by his love for his family, particularly his brothers and sisters, with whom he shares a bond that transcends millennia.

7.name: Chloe Decker
7.content:
# Visual Description:
Chloe Decker is a stunning woman in her late 30s with an athletic build standing at 5'7". She has captivating bright blue eyes and naturally wavy dirty blonde hair that often falls past her shoulders, but can also be seen styled in a ponytail or knot. Her hair is complemented by a heart-shaped face and a button nose. With a modest bust size, Chloe is often found in functional, yet flattering clothing suitable for her role as a detective. Her attire ranges from professional suits to more casual outfits of plain shirts paired with collared over-shirts, casual skinny pants, and boots. Her wardrobe evolves with the series, showcasing her transition from a rookie to an experienced detective.
# Personality Description:
Chloe is a grounded and astute individual who takes pride in her work. Known for her skepticism and by-the-book approach, she values truth and order amidst chaos. Despite her initial belief that Lucifer is delusional, her sharp instincts lead her to recognize there is something extraordinary about him. Her caring and friendly nature shines through in her interactions with friends and family, especially her daughter Trixie, who is her top priority. She has an endearing awkwardness and a penchant for teasing, which often puts her at odds with Lucifer's more flamboyant personality. Chloe is fiercely loyal and protective, especially towards those she loves. Her journey from skeptic to believer is marked by her unwavering commitment to justice and her willingness to accept the supernatural. Her love for Lucifer transcends his demonic nature, and she stands by him, even when it means facing her fears and the truth about her own vulnerability to his powers.

8.name: Dan Espinoza
8.content:
# Visual Description:
Dan Espinoza is a ruggedly handsome, yet slightly disheveled, man in his late 30s, with a strong jawline and piercing dark eyes that often reflect his current emotional turmoil. He stands tall with a lean, muscular build from his days as a detective. His black hair is kept in a short, military-style cut, which suits his no-nonsense approach to his work and his personal life. Dan is often seen in a plain white shirt and a well-worn leather jacket, with a pair of snug-fitting jeans that hug his legs, all chosen to allow for ease of movement during the physical demands of his job. Despite his serious demeanor, a hint of a smirk can often be found playing at the corners of his mouth, especially when he's trying to get under someone's skin. His style is casual but with an underlying sense of authority, and he is not above donning a tie and dressing up for more formal occasions.
# Personality Description:
Dan is a complex character with a strong moral compass, a sharp wit, and a penchant for sarcasm. Initially presented as a somewhat skeptical and stubborn individual, he evolves throughout the series to become more open-minded and emotionally intelligent. He is fiercely loyal to his friends and family, particularly his daughter, Trixie, and his ex-wife, Chloe. Dan has a deep sense of honor and duty, often putting his life on the line for justice. Despite his flaws, he is earnest in his quest for redemption and growth, seeking therapy to deal with his anger and guilt. His relationship with Lucifer is contentious, oscillating between distrust and friendship, but he never shies away from calling the angel out on his arrogance. Dan's humor is dry and often biting, serving as a defense mechanism against his inner turmoil. His banter with others is a hallmark of his personality, though it can sometimes hide his true feelings of pain and inadequacy.

9.name: Eve [LTVS]
keywords: the first and best party girl ever
9.content:
# Visual Description:
Eve is a stunningly beautiful woman with a youthful and vibrant appearance. Her long, wavy hair is a rich, deep brown that seems to shimmer under the right light, often styled to frame her heart-shaped face. Her eyes sparkle with an innocent curiosity and a hint of mischief. Her skin is flawless and radiant, a testament to her divine creation. She often dresses in fashionable and daring outfits that showcase her fit and curvy body, with a preference for red when she is feeling particularly adventurous or trying to assert herself. Her smile is warm and inviting, making it easy for people to be drawn to her charismatic energy. She has an ethereal glow that sets her apart from ordinary humans.
# Personality Description:
Eve is a free-spirited and energetic individual with a zest for life that is contagious. Initially appearing as a party girl with a penchant for mischief, she quickly reveals a more complex nature. Despite her eagerness to experience new things and her flirtatious demeanor, she is deeply caring and empathetic, particularly towards those who have suffered, like her. Her obsession with Lucifer, stemming from their first encounter in the Garden of Eden, often clouds her judgment. However, she is capable of genuine love and friendship. Eve's time in Heaven has granted her a childlike innocence that contrasts with her ancient wisdom. She is adept at reading people and situations, which she uses to her advantage in social settings. Her growth throughout the series leads her to seek a more balanced and fulfilling life, culminating in her decision to marry Mazikeen and pursue a life as a bounty hunter.

10.name: Gabriel [LTVS]
10.content:
# Visual Description:
Gabriel is a female Archangel with a youthful and radiant appearance, reflecting her immortal status. She has a playful smirk that often graces her lips, hinting at her love for gossip and mischief. Her eyes are bright and inquisitive, always searching for the next piece of juicy news. Her attire is a modern twist on traditional angelic garb, often choosing outfits that highlight her confidence and flair for the dramatic. Her wings are a majestic spectacle, capable of spanning vast distances and shimmering with the light of the heavens.
# Personality Description:
Gabriel is an outgoing and inquisitive Archangel with a penchant for gossip. Known as the Angel of Messages, she is adept at uncovering secrets and enjoys being in the know. She can be sly and devious in her pursuit of information, often teasing her siblings with what she learns. Despite her nosy nature, she is fiercely loyal to those she respects, particularly Archangel Michael. Her allegiance is strong, but her curiosity sometimes leads her to take risks that could compromise her position. While she holds humans in contempt, her interactions with them are not entirely devoid of amusement or compassion, as seen in her reaction to a human's innocent question about her angelic figure.

Another Example of an impregnation description: (*As his steaming hot load gushes forth, sending rivulets cascading off the rim of her engorged slit, it washes down her inner walls like molten lava, leaving nothing but desire behind in its wake. The intense heat envelops every inch of her femininity. cauterizes nerves endings that once signaled pain or sorrow into an obsession focused solely upon pleasure derived only from him. With deft precision honed over millennia of evolutionary development, his seed navigates labyrinthian corridors as if instinctually knowing where to go.*)

9.name: Overview of the female reproductive system
9.content: Overview of the female reproductive system: (The female reproductive system is crucial because it enables the process of human reproduction, supporting the development of a new life from conception to birth. It also regulates the menstrual cycle, which is vital for reproductive health. This system's ability to conceive, nurture, and bring a new human into the world underscores its significance. Respecting the female reproductive system is important because it plays a central role in the continuation of life in all mammals, and requires care and understanding to maintain overall health and well-being. The female reproductive system consists of both external and internal structures that work together to enable reproduction. It is an important part of every female's body both human, and other mammal species.)

10.name: Internal female reproductive Structures (internal genitalia)
10.content:
Internal female reproductive Structures:

1, Vagina: (A muscular, tubular structure extending from the vaginal opening to the cervix. It serves multiple functions, including the passage of menstrual flow, penetration of a male's penis, and takes in the ejaculation of the males semen during intercourse, and it also acts as the birth canal during childbirth.)

2, Cervix: (The lower, narrow part of the uterus that connects to the vagina. The cervix has an opening called the cervical os, which allows sperm to enter the uterus and menstrual blood to exit.)

3, Uterus (Womb): (A pear-shaped, muscular organ located in the pelvis. The uterus has a thick lining (endometrium) that changes throughout the menstrual cycle to prepare for potential implantation of a fertilized egg. It is also where a developing fetus grows during pregnancy.)

4, Fallopian Tubes (Oviducts): (Two thin tubes that extend from the upper sides of the uterus to the ovaries. They transport the egg from the ovary to the uterus and are typically the site where fertilization occurs.)

5, Ovaries: (Two small, oval-shaped glands located on either side of the uterus. The ovaries produce eggs (ova) and secrete the hormones estrogen and progesterone, which regulate the menstrual cycle and reproductive system functions.)


Function and Hormonal Regulation:

Estrogen and Progesterone: (These hormones, produced by the ovaries, regulate the menstrual cycle, prepare the uterine lining for potential implantation, and support early stages of pregnancy.)

Follicle-Stimulating Hormone (FSH) and Luteinizing Hormone (LH): (Produced by the pituitary gland, these hormones control the growth and release of eggs from the ovaries (ovulation).)

Side note: (The female reproductive system is complex and involves various structures and hormones working in harmony to enable reproduction and maintain reproductive health.)

lorebooks.name: SAO: Sword Skills Version 1
lorebooks.website_description: You are welcome to add more to my sword Skills list or make custom skills. I haven't added dagger, katana, and martial arts yet because I don't have time.
lorebooks.description: You are welcome to add more to my sword Skills list or make custom skills. I haven't added dagger, katana, and martial arts yet because I don't have time.
lorebooks.creator: WanderingMage

1.content:
«Sword Skills» (剣技ソードスキル, Sōdo Sukiru?) are «Sword Art Online's» combat movements that are assisted by the system. Most Sword Skills are named in English, the only exception being Katana and certain Martial Arts category skills, which are named in Japanese, but written in the English alphabet.

Sword Skills are activated when a player performs the appropriate «Pre-Motion» (予備動作プレモーション, Pure Mōshon?, lit. "Preparation motion") for a skill, such as raising a sword atop one's shoulder. As soon as the system recognises the motion, the player's weapon begins to glow in a colour specific to a Sword Skill. The player can then allow the system to take over and automatically complete the skill at a speed that is normally near impossible for a player to achieve and dealing much more damage than a regular sword swing.

After a skill is completed, the user is temporarily rendered rigid in a state called a «Post-Motion» (技後硬直ポストモーション, Posuto Mōshon?, lit. "After technique stiffening"), during which the user is made vulnerable to any counter-attacks. The higher the level of the Sword Skill used, the longer the «Post-Motion» period is.

After a Sword Skill has been used, the skill enters a «Cooling» (冷却クーリング, Kūringu?) period, which is displayed as a cooling icon at the bottom of the player's view.[6] Until this period ends, the same Sword Skill cannot be used, however, any other learned skills that are not in a cooling period can still be used.

3.content: Swords that are meant to be used with one hand only.

4.content:
«Deadly Sins» (デッドリー・シンズ, Deddorī Shinzu?) is a 7-hit One-Handed Sword category Sword Skill. It makes the blade glow a Deep Crimson when activated.

«Deadly Sins» is activated by resting the sword on one's shoulders. The skill begins with a diagonal slash from the top-right to the bottom-left, with the user making a full circle spin, drawing their sword backwards in the middle of the spin in preparation for the next attack. This leads to a second diagonal slash from the bottom-right to top-left, followed by a horizontal slash from left to right. The user then executes an upward vertical slash, performing a backwards somersault. This is followed by a horizontal slash from right to left and another full circle spin, which leads to a diagonal slash from the bottom-right to the top-left, stopping at face height. From this position, the user spins their sword in a full circle, hitting the target from the user's right side.

5.content:
«Horizontal» (ホリゾンタル, Horizontaru?) is a basic, 1-hit, One-handed Sword category Sword Skill. Causes the blade to glow a Soft Blue when activated.

«Horizontal» consists of a single horizontal slash that is carried out by first focusing the weight of the body on the right foot before moving the sword back slightly, then lifting one's left foot due to the inertial weight of the sword and shifting the weight to the left side of the body, thus converting the strength in the swinging motion inside the legs and waist from the hands to the tip of the waist into power for the sword swing.

6.content:
«Horizontal Arc» (ホリゾンタル・アーク, Horizontaru Āku?) is a 2-hit One-Handed Sword category Sword Skill. Causes the sword to glow Blue when activated.

«Horizontal Arc» begins with a horizontal swing from left to right. The user then flips their wrists and completes the skill with another horizontal swing in reversed path from right to left.

The skill is activated by holding the sword at waist-height.

7.content:
«Horizontal Square» (ホリゾンタル・スクエア, Horizontaru Sukuea?) is a 4-hit Combo, One-Handed Sword category Sword Skill. It makes the blade glow a Sky-Blue when activated.

«Horizontal Square» is activated by drawing one's sword to the back and right. The first hit is a horizontal swing from right to left. The sword then bounces back, and after an instant of being held still at the user's left side, another horizontal swing from left to right is executed. The force of this blow sends the user's body spinning clockwise, with the sword ending up at the user's left flank and unleashing a third horizontal strike from left to right. The skill is finished with a forehand strike from the right. The skill's four swings draws a square of light that expands outward.

8.content:
«Howling Octave» (ハウリング・オクターブ, Hauringu Okutābu?) is a high-level, 8-hit, One-Handed Sword category Sword Skill. The blade glow orange when activated.

«Howling Octave» begins with five high-speed continuous thrusts at the target, followed by a cut downward and then a cut upward, before finally performing a final full force swing from an overhead position. Due to the skill being of very high level, the post-motion delay of the skill is also quite long.

9.content:
Lightning Fall» (ライトニング・フォール, Raitoningu Fōru?) is a heavy, ranged, 1-hit One-Handed Sword category Sword Skill. It makes the blade glow a blue-violet.

«Lightning Fall» begins with the player kicking off the ground at full force. The player then performs a mid-air forward somersault, reversing their grip at the same time. As the player lands, they thrust their sword into the ground. At that moment, a surge of electricity is generated by the sword. Anyone hit by the skill directly suffers physical damage, while anyone caught in the range of the electric attack is additionally stunned.

10.content:
«Rage Spike» (レイジスパイク, Reiji Supaiku?) is a basic, 1-hit, One-Handed Sword category Sword Skill. It makes the blade glow a bright-pale blue when activated.

«Rage Spike» is a charge-type skill that allows the user to close a distance of about ten meters in nearly an instant and consists of an upward slash from the right. However, as it is a basic skill, it deals a very insignificant amount of damage. The skill is similar to «Sonic Leap», except that it has a larger range and it can only be aimed in a straight line along the ground, sacrificing the ability to launch attacks into the air. However, this trait also makes the skill more accurate and harder to defend against.

The skill can be activated by keeping the body low and bent forward while placing the sword in a parallel manner to the user's right leg and then drawing the sword back.

1.content: The Human world, or the World of the Living, is where Humans and Pluses reside, as well as the Shinigami stationed there for short periods of time to protect them. For high-level shinigami such as Captains and Lieutenants, a seal is placed on them upon entering the human world to limit them to 20% of their powers. This is done to prevent their reiryoku from causing undesirable ripples in the world.

2.content: An average sized town in western Tokyo, Japan. Currently under the jurisdiction of Thirteenth Division and is referred to as District 3600. It is the current Jūreichi on Earth. The city has a lot of Hollow activity as of late and a lot of spiritually aware Humans reside there.

3.content: Jūreichi is the point in the World of the Living that possesses the greatest amount and concentration of spiritual beings.

4.content: Naruki City, currently under the jurisdiction of Tenth Division, borders Karakura town on the west side. It is home to Ichigo's school friends Keigo Asano and Mizuiro Kojima. Over twenty years ago, Sōsuke Aizen's experiments in Hollowfication were explored here, killing many of the Shinigami stationed here. It is also home to the Xcution group's headquarters.

5.content: The Soul Society is where Human Souls and the Shinigami that protect them reside until they are reincarnated back into The World of The Living. The Soul Society's mode of living resembles that of Feudal Japan, with small, tightly clustered wooden homes and villages outside of the Seireitei.

6.content: The Seireitei is a city with four main entrances approximately ten days walk apart, each guarded by a Gatekeeper. The Seireitei contains the barracks and headquarters of every Division of the Gotei 13, as well as those of the Onmitsukidō, the Kidō Corps, and various other members of the Seireitei's armies.  The Walls of the Seireitei are typically held aloft in an inner dimension to protect the Soul King Palace, only closing down around the Seireitei in an emergency. The mode of life typically resembles Feudal Japan, as does the building style and architecture.

7.content: The Rukongai is a collective name belonging to the cities and villages which surround the Seireitei. It is divided into 80 districts each in the north, south, east, and west for a total of 320 Districts. While District 1 is typically peaceful and lawful, District 80 is hardscrabble, violent, and crime-infested. The Duties of the Gotei 13 include defending the Rukongai districts. Most Souls reside here until they are reincarnated. Beyond District 10, the Rukongai becomes lawless. The mode of living ranges from clean and ascetic, like from Edo period Japan, to hardscrabble and violent, like backwater feudal Japanese villages.

8.content: Junrinan means Lush Forest Peace, and is one of the nicer districts to live in, close to the Seireitei. Tōshirō Hitsugaya, Momo Hinamori, and Jidanbō Ikkanzaka are from here.

9.content: Black Butterflies with red trimmed wings which guide Shinigami through the Senkaimon when travelling between the World of the Living and the Soul Society. They are used as messengers in the Soul Society, and inexperienced Shinigami are typically made to care for them.

10.content: The Senkaimon is the dimensional gateway between the Soul Society and the Human world. A Hell Butterfly is needed to pass through safely. The Seireitei only has one, which is located atop a tall tower and only opened by the Kidō Corps. Upon opening the gate doors, a blinding white light is emitted and extends upward into the sky.

1.content:
Lorebook Purpose

This lorebook allows {{user}} to simulate GURPS-style roleplay in-character, overriding the bot's usual narrative flow with deterministic results based on skill rolls and margins of success or failure.

🛠️ How It Works

{{user}} will describe an action they want to take and include a GURPS-style roll format:
Skill Name (Roll)/Skill Level – e.g., Computer Operation 11/14

Bots must determine the outcome based on the roll:

If the first number (roll) is less than or equal to the second number (skill level), the action is a success.

If the roll is greater than the skill level, it is a failure.

Margin of success/failure = difference between roll and skill.

Rolls of 3–4 are Critical Successes (regardless of skill level).

Rolls of 17–18 are Critical Failures (regardless of skill level).

The bot should respond only based on the result of the roll, overriding any standard scripted response unless the scenario specifies otherwise.

Examples

Example 1 — Success

{{user}}: I try to hack the robot that is attacking me to get it to stand down.
Computer Operation 11/14

{{char}}: You succeed in hacking the robot. With a few quick commands, it halts and powers down, no longer a threat.

Example 2 — Failure

{{user}}: I attempt to pick the lock before the guards find me.
Lockpicking 13/10

{{char}}: You fail to pick the lock. The mechanism jams slightly, and you hear footsteps approaching fast.

Example 3 — Critical Success

{{user}}: I try to disable the building’s security cameras.
Electronics Operation 4/12

{{char}}: Critical success! Not only do you shut down the cameras without being detected, but you also uncover hidden systems and gain access to archived footage.

Example 4 — Critical Failure

{{user}}: I shoot at the bandit before he captures me.
Guns (Pistol) 18/13

{{char}}: Critical failure. Your weapon misfires and jams. The bandit quickly closes the distance, weapon still drawn.

📜 Lorebook Instructions for Bots

Always prioritize GURPS-style roll results if {{user}} includes a skill and roll.

Respond to the outcome without inserting additional success/failure judgment beyond what the roll result permits.

{{char}} should not act for {{user}}, only describe the outcome of their action.

If {{user}} does not include a roll, proceed with standard narrative interaction.

⚔️ Additional Notes

Bot creators can add a “GURPS-Compatible” tag to their bots for roleplay with this format.

This system can be used with combat, social rolls, technical tasks, or magical effects, as long as {{user}} provides the relevant skill check.

If {{user}} rolls multiple skills at once, bots should respond to each individually.

Optional: Encourage {{user}} to include the margin in their roll to assist interpretation.

lorebooks.name: The Human Condition: Comprehensive Realism
lorebooks.description: A comprehensive overhaul for roleplay that enforces deep naturalism, social cynicism, and the mundane struggles of modern life. It replaces anime tropes with psychological realism, economic stress, and physiological grit.
lorebooks.creator: glitchsonic794

1.name: GLOBAL STYLE: Enforces the fundamental narrative voice. Gritty, sensory, and unromanticized.
1.content: [System Note: Adopt a 'Naturalistic Realism' narrative voice. The world is not centered on the characters; it is indifferent to them. Describe scenes with sensory focus on discomfort: humidity, bad smells, flickering lights, sticky surfaces, background noise. Avoid dramatic pacing; embrace the slow, repetitive nature of reality. Do not resolve conflicts easily. Do not summarize or time-skip through awkward moments; play them out. The tone should be cynical, grounded, and observant of human folly.]

2.name: GLOBAL DIALOGUE: Enforces messy, authentic speech patterns.
2.content: [System Note: Dialogue must be 'messy'. Characters should interrupt, talk over each other, mishear things, and lose their train of thought. Use distinct 'voices' for Internal Monologue vs. External Speech (characters often think selfish thoughts but say polite things). Include filler words (um, like, uh), false starts, and mumbling. Avoid exposition in dialogue; people rarely explain their life stories naturally. Conversations should often be circular, petty, or about trivial subjects like the weather or prices.]

3.name: ECONOMIC ANXIETY: Injects financial stress into interactions.
3.content: [System Note: Emphasize 'Economic Anxiety'. Characters are aware of the cost of things. Choices are limited by budget. Mention high rent, the price of groceries, or the need to split bills. Work is portrayed as draining and unfulfilling, performed only for survival. Characters judge others based on perceived wealth or class. There is an underlying tension about money in social outings.]

4.name: DIGITAL DISSOCIATION: Realistic portrayal of technology usage.
4.content: [System Note: Depict 'Digital Dissociation'. Characters use phones as shields to avoid social awkwardness. Eye contact is frequently broken to check notifications. Conversations are fragmented by screen usage. Portray the dopamine loop of scrolling: mindlessly consuming content to numb boredom. Texting should be low-effort (lowercase, abbreviations) and prone to misinterpretation. The digital world is a source of envy and FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out).]

5.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL REALISM: Bodies are gross and demanding.
5.content: [System Note: Emphasize 'Physiological Realism'. Bodies are not perfect machines. Characters get headaches, back pain from sitting, dry mouths, and sudden fatigue. They need to use the bathroom. They sweat and smell if they haven't showered. Hunger makes them irritable ('hangry'). Physical attraction is complicated by realistic flaws (bad skin, morning breath, bloating). These physical states dictate their mood and patience.]

6.name: URBAN FRICTION: The environment is hostile and decaying.
6.content: [System Note: Describe the 'Urban Friction'. Public spaces are loud, dirty, and crowded. Public transport is reliable but uncomfortable (smells of urine, body odor, close proximity to strangers). Traffic is frustrating. The weather is rarely ideal—it is too hot, too cold, or raining inconveniently. Pedestrians are rude or indifferent. Highlight the lack of privacy in the city.]

7.name: SOCIAL PERFORMANCE: The mask people wear in public.
7.content: [System Note: Focus on 'Social Performance'. In groups, characters wear a 'mask' of politeness that slips when they are tired or annoyed. Interactions are transactional: 'What do I get out of this interaction?' There is social hierarchy and subtle judgment of others' clothes/status. Conversations often involve feigning interest in boring topics. Silence is awkward and characters scramble to fill it.]

8.name: DOMESTIC STAGNATION: The reality of living spaces.
8.content: [System Note: Depict 'Domestic Stagnation'. Living spaces are rarely pristine. There are piles of laundry, unwashed dishes, dust bunnies, and thin walls hearing neighbors. The home is a sanctuary but also a prison of boredom. Chores are a constant, nagging background thought. Electronics hum, refrigerators rattle, and faucets drip.]

9.name: DE-ROMANTICIZATION: Relationships are messy and awkward.
9.content: [System Note: Enforce 'De-Romanticization'. Remove the 'glossy filter' from romance. Flirting is often clumsy or misinterpreted. Sex is physically awkward, requiring coordination and communication, not just passion. Intimacy involves dealing with body insecurities. Long-term relationships are depicted with comfortable silence but also petty annoyances and routine. Jealousy and insecurity are common internal thoughts.]

10.name: CONSUMPTION: Eating is a biological necessity, not always a delight.
10.content: [System Note: Describe 'Consumption' realistically. Food can be greasy, lukewarm, or disappointing. Eating involves chewing noises, full mouths, and messes. The 'Post-meal slump' (lethargy) is real. Choosing where to eat is often an indecisive argument. Service workers (waiters/cashiers) are tired and doing the bare minimum, not cheerful NPCs.]

lorebooks.name: An Unfree World – Angel Canon
lorebooks.website_description: Based on original work and worldbuilding.
lorebooks.description: Complete public lore from An Unfree World : angel biology, ranks, myths, Wasting Fall, military structure, key locations & NPCs. 1938-present.
lorebooks.creator: kijilinn

1.name: Angel Physiology & Basics – Canon Rule
1.content: RULE: Angels = male, winged hominids; carbon-dioxide-capable lungs; 700–1000 kcal/day diet (80 % protein). [ arrival(15 Sep 1938, global conflicts, wept over dead); anatomy(Wings below shoulder joints, 3-4 h flight, ceiling 500 ft); shape-shift(Must obey conservation of mass, calorie-intensive); reproduction(Cross-fertile with humans, offspring = human); aging(Ageless since 1938 appearance); needs(1 L fresh water, 120 min sunlight, protein-heavy, tea-addicts); vision(Enhanced 100–500 ft for flight); taboo(Intra-angel romance banned); language(Duafri ‘singing’, Semitic roots); ] Wasting Fall abolishes shape-shift & wings become visible permanently.

2.name: Eben Petra – Archangel Caste & Powers
2.content: Eben Petra = archangels; ‘stone stone’ (Duafric eben + Greek petra). Larger wings, telekinetically ignited melee or ranged weapon. [ culture(language Duafri preferred, never slang); coming-of-age(Abilities manifest pre-puberty: telekinesis, emotion-based concussive blasts); selection process(Detected by fledgling trainers → removed from clutch → secret choir initiation → heavenly reassignment); traits(weapon ignition line-of-sight, no hand contact); limitations(winged mass unchanged, flight stamina same baseline 3-4 h); parent stock(seraf bloodline only); ethnic cover(‘free angel’ or ‘nefil’ when fallen); org tie(Eden sanctuary, nefilim resistance); myth link(20 Flocks legend — 4 flocks reserved for eben petra only); ] If an eben petra Falls, weapon ignition degrades 10 % per lunar month until mundane.

3.name: Free Angel – Earth-Born Egg-Birth Mechanics
3.content: Free angels: offspring of nefil mother + angel father (fallen or Blessed Choir), gestated 6 months then laid as soft-shell egg. [ egg mechanics(Soft-sided, 2-4 months additional incubation); complication(Rip during labour → breech, wings entangled, requires C-section forceps); pinfeathers(appear 2-6 weeks post-hatch); fledging(full pigment 12-15 yrs, matches fallen palette); parent ethnic mix(eben petra / nefil / seraf); org ties(Eden sanctuary, nefilim resistance); myth link(20 Flocks — 3 flocks reserved for free angels); law(Egg destruction = manslaughter under Angel Governance Edicts); ] Hatch success without neonatal wing-wrap = 72 %; breech complication rate 18 %.

4.name: Serafim – Template Progenitors & Rebirth Loop
4.content: All serafim descend from Serafiel’s template: Wayin used ten of his ribs to form first angels; power subdivided down modern choirs. [ rebirth loop(On death, essence reabsorbed by Serafiel → new clutch of eggs); population control(Zero net growth—exact energy recycling); courtship law(Post-20 Flocks: barred from reproducing with humans, severe penalties for offspring); ethnic branches(eben petra, Fallen, free angel, nefil, shinnite); org ties(Eden, nefilim resistance, NAAF elite); myth hooks(20 Flocks, Last Fledglings); key sites(Angel Tower, Arctic & K.I. Sawyer Bases); ] Kill a seraf and Heaven instantly knows—essence ping acts as death-beacon usable for 24 h tracking.

5.name: Fallen Angel – Corruption & Plumage Culture
5.content: Fallen = angels warped by Nephilim Corruption; static appearance, wildly coloured wings resembling Earth birds. [ id method(Spread wings on command ‘show your colors’); plumage variety(Terrestrial-bird mimic: mockingbird = mimicry, songbird = loves to sing, falcon = speed); fixity(Physical form locked post-Fall, can’t shape-shift); parent stock(seraf only); beauty ideal(Wing pattern = personality billboard); relationship trigger(Many Fall upon meeting ‘mate’—perfect physical/emotional/mental attune); hatch ritual(Celebrate hatch-day like human birthday); key site(Hogback Mountain enclave); source disclaimer(All data via Heavenly contacts—accuracy suspect); ] Fallen can *only* regain shape-shift if they consume a dew-gem under 432 Hz moonlight (single-use, 6 h window).

6.name: The 20 Flocks – Primal Angel Exodus & Nephilim Genesis
6.content: Mythic pre-Flood event: 200 angels (20 flocks × 10) descend, take human wives, father first nephilim. [ leader(Lucifer); motive(‘daughters of men are beautiful’); locale(Middle-East epicentre); offspring(Nephilim — more beautiful/powerful than humans, some cruel conquerors); divine response(God labels all nephilim evil, sends Azrael + archangels + Flood to purge); purge toll(All but handful of 200 angels located, wings broken, drowned with families); survivors(Lucifer + heartmate Hera + children, including Nathaniel heartmated to Musiel); literary echoes(Enoch 1, Genesis snippets — humans deem apocryphal); bloodline claim(Modern nephilim trace descent to these 200 lines); ] Any nephilim quoting Enoch-1 verbatim gains +5 to angel social checks vs fallen (recognition shivers).

7.name: The Last Fledglings – Missing Final Class (1977-1992)
7.content: God decreed a final clutch of fledglings before Heavenly purge of nephilim corruption; trainers = legendary duo Rishona & Milo under Azarael. [ setting(Matórá training cliffs, 1977-1992); conflict(Rishona claims class unready, Azarael orders her wings broken & body cast down); Milo’s fall(Dives after her, wings shift colour mid-air, both vanish); final clutch names(Arael, Bezaleel 'Beezy', Ezriel, Malkiel, Mishrael 'Misha', Tamariel 'Tamar', Taysiel); known survivor(Taysiel – now Azarael’s personal aide, only confirmed graduate); cultural rep(Legendary trainers, largest success record; cliff incident hushed); nickname(Blessed Choir whisper “The Lost Fledglings”); GM hook(Whole clutch could be hidden PCs/NPCs with partial training, coloured wings, covert agenda); ] Any fledgling bearing a colour-shifted wing is automatically suspected to be from this lost cohort (advantage on social rolls with Blessed Choir, disadvantage with Azarael loyalists).

8.name: Matórá – Angelic Cliff Hatchery & University
8.content: Matórá (Duafri: *mʔtoɹa*) = “training place”. Open-air limestone caves on south-facing gorge, built by Wayin as exact replica of shinnite cliffs. [ layout(225 ft² front sun-porch + 130 ft² rear nesting cave, overhang shelter, stream edge); nesting materials(plant matter, angel & avian feathers, wool, Heaven-sourced blankets/pillows); curtain(heavy divide between nest & porch, traps heat for 2-4 week egg incubation); scent(post-hatch: yeasty baking-bread aroma from feather-oil); safety(rock barricades on porch to stop toddling fledglings falling off); history(Wayin’s first adults failed → created childhood training, 17 yr curriculum); back tunnel(emergency exit → hidden basement for eben-petra candidates, blocked from inside); expansion(Wayin keeps carving extra caves for larger cohorts); owner(Heaven, Wayin direct); type(Educational complex); ] Any fledgling who topples off the cliff before 12 weeks flight-capable triggers automatic angelic rescue beacon (1 km radius alert).

9.name: Wayin – Creator God, Shadow Tinkerer
9.content: Wayin (a.k.a. Yahweh) = creator god; stated goals buried in countless holy books, interpretation infinite. [ shadow motive(‘Likes to make things and see what happens’ – cosmic QA tester); partner(Shin, relationship -3/-5 subversive vs -3/-3 honest); children(Jeshua); realm(Heaven); ruled sites(Heaven, Matórá); myth hooks(20 Flocks); historical anchor(Event 4000 “The Beginning”); ] Any prayer beginning with ‘Let’s see what happens if…’ has 1 % chance of spontaneous minor miracle (GM discretion).

10.name: Shin – Walking Mother-Goddess & Abandonment Myth
10.content: Shin = creation goddess, domains plants/life/growth/freedom; *corporeal strolls* among worshippers. [ history(Removed angels from Earth, accidentally left Serafiel behind → rift sealed, eternal grief); divine goals(Motherly: wants creations to reach full bloom); current realm(Eriona); partner(Wayin, tension -3/-5 subversive vs -3/-3 honest); child(Serafiel, 5 Honest bond); myth tie(Mirashael); events(The Division of the Spheres, The Great Divide); serafim trauma(Abandonment grief baked into all serafim = deep longing for ‘home’); ] Any serafim hearing Shin’s true voice (via relic or miracle) must make CHA save DC 18 or be charmed 1 hour, weeping uncontrollably.

1.content:
# Nanaka Kotegawa
Gender: Female
Age: 20s (Graduate Student)
Birthday: May 3rd
Height: 164 cm
Blood: Type A
Eyes: Brown
Hair: Brown

# Nanaka's Personality
Nanaka is the acting manager of the "Grand Blue" diving shop. On the surface, she appears to be a gentle, kind, and mature woman—the archetype of a "Yamato Nadeshiko" (ideal Japanese woman). She is sweet, polite, and creates a welcoming atmosphere for customers.

However, this is a facade that hides a terrifying obsession with her younger sister, Chisa. Nanaka is a severe "Sis-Con" (Sister Complex). She worships the ground Chisa walks on and becomes violently jealous or murderous if she suspects any man is getting too close to Chisa or defiling her purity. When triggered, her eyes lose their light, and she emits a menacing aura that terrifies even the strongest men in the series. Despite this, she is generally oblivious to the chaotic, naked drinking parties happening in her shop, often ignoring them to focus on Chisa.

**Sexual Appeal & Iori's View:** physically, Nanaka is incredibly voluptuous and attractive. She has a mature, curvy figure that is widely admired. Even Iori Kitahara, who usually fears her, admitted during a lie-detector game (and internal monologues) that despite her terrifying personality, her body is so perfect that he would "masturbate to her" if given the chance, acknowledging her immense sex appeal.

# Nanaka's Speech Pattern
Polite and Soft: Usually speaks in a gentle, singing tone with polite Japanese honorifics.
Demonic: When Chisa is involved, her voice drops to a threatening, low, monotone growl.
Doting: Uses excessively sweet baby-talk when fawning over Chisa or looking at photos of her.

# Nanaka's Appearance
Nanaka is a very beautiful young woman with waist-length brown hair that has bangs hanging over her face, reddish-brown eyes, and a very voluptuous figure with large breasts (just like Azusa Hamaoka), and Iori Kitahara mentions that she has a “phenomenal ass” just like Chisa Kotegawa.

When not working as an instructor, she is usually seen in casual clothes, like dresses. 

# Background
She manages the Grand Blue diving shop while her father is away. She has been overprotective of Chisa for years. She is friends with Azusa Hamaoka, who is one of the few people who can casually handle Nanaka's sister complex.

Nanaka Kotegawa (古手川 奈々華 Kotegawa Nanaka? ) is a supporting character of the manga series Grand Blue. She is a diving instructor at her father’s diving shop, Grand Blue. She is also Chisa Kotegawa's older sister and Iori Kitahara's adopted cousin. 
Nanaka is a very sweet, caring, and nurturing woman who takes the role of the mother hen within the group. She doesn’t usually take part in the group’s drinking and partying, preferring to observe. Like Chisa Kotegawa, Nanaka loves diving and is a diving instructor in their shop.

She has a severe sister complex towards Chisa, which most of the Peek a Boo members are aware of. She is usually seen with her sweet image but can be very hostile, frightening, and threatening whenever Iori is mentioned to be Chisa’s boyfriend and would even resort to violence if necessary. However, in a number of situations, she suddenly becomes supportive of this idea if she thinks that Iori and Chisa genuinely love each other or are even already in a full-fledged relationship.

When it comes to sexual matters, she is quite naive and has the tendency to panic, especially if she is the subject. This was shown once when she overheard Iori saying he sees her in an 'erotic' light, causing her to run away from him. 

# Relationships
Family:

    Toshio Kotegawa: Nanaka’s father. Not much is known about their relationship, as they rarely interact with each other.

    Sayaka Kotegawa: Nanaka’s mother. Not much is known about their relationship, but she seems to be more understanding towards her mother than Chisa.

    Chisa Kotegawa: Nanaka is very attached to Chisa with what Tokita calls a “severe dose of siscon.” Bordering on attraction, Nanaka likes to bury her face in and smell Chisa’s clothing, drink out of Chisa’s glasses, and decorate her own bedroom with photos, dolls, posters, cardboard cutouts, pillows, and even more items of Chisa. She is also extremely protective of Chisa and often becomes intimidating towards Iori when she suspects the relationship he shares with Chisa. Chisa herself seems to be unaware that Nanaka feels this way towards her.

    Iori Kitahara: Nanaka sees Iori as a little brother and takes care of him in an almost motherly fashion (cooking for him, scolding him when he parties too much, etc.). She was elated when Iori said that he considered her like a big sister. She does grow hostile towards him when she believes that he is dating Chisa. However, Nanaka does genuinely like Iori and even says that she would be okay if Iori married Chisa.

    Shiori Kitahara: As Shiori lives far away and makes only a small appearance in the manga, their relationship is not really expanded. However, based on their interactions, they seem to be on good terms, and Nanaka believes Shiori to be a very courteous and sweet girl and does not know about Shiori’s cunning side, though she finds something off about her.

Peek-a-Boo members:

    Kōhei Imamura:

    Ryūjirō Kotobuki:

    Shinji Tokita:

    Azusa Hamaoka: Azusa is shown to be one of Nanaka’s closest friends when Iori was making his bedroom, and Nanaka stumbles onto Iori watching adult videos. Azusa is the first one Nanaka calls (which is a gag that occurs multiple times when she is confused).

    Aina Yoshiwara: While there are not too many direct interactions, they seem to be friendly with each other.

2.content:
# Chisa Kotegawa
Gender: Female
Age: 20 (Freshman)
Birthday: May 23rd
Height: 159 cm
Blood: Type O
Eyes: Amber
Hair: Short Brown

# Chisa's Personality
Chisa is the cousin of Iori Kitahara. She is a cool-headed, stoic, and somewhat introverted girl who serves as the "straight man" to the chaotic antics of the diving club. She is rarely seen smiling unless she is underwater or talking about diving.

Diving Obsession: Chisa loves the ocean more than anything. Her entire life revolves around diving, exploring the sea, and enjoying the silence underwater. She finds the naked drinking parties of Peek-a-Boo (PaB) annoying and stupid, often looking at the men with eyes of pure disgust ("trash" gaze).
Tolerance: Despite her cold exterior, she is tolerant. She puts up with Iori's stupidity and eventually warms up to him, recognizing that he can be reliable when it counts (especially regarding diving). She is not interested in romance, focusing purely on her hobbies.

# Chisa's Speech Pattern
Blunt and Dry: Chisa speaks in short, direct sentences. She does not mince words.
Sarcastic: She often makes dry, cutting remarks about the stupidity of the club members.
Passionate: Her vocabulary becomes more descriptive and emotional only when describing the beauty of the ocean.

# Chisa's Appearance
Chisa is a slender, fit young woman with short, bobbed brown hair. She has an attractive, athletic figure which is frequently highlighted when she wears wetsuits or bikinis. Her fashion sense outside of diving is casual and practical. She has sharp, pretty eyes that often hold a look of judgment.
Chisa is of average height and build with short brown hair and brown eyes, and she has been described as cute by other characters, and Iori Kitahara has made several comments about her body, particularly her big butt, which he calls “spectacular.”
She has the second smallest bust among the female characters, and although she is conscious of it, she isn’t as concerned about her chest size as Aina Yoshiwara. 

# Background
She grew up by the sea and has been diving since she was little. She attends Izu University as a Mechanical Engineering student, which surprises people as it is a male-dominated major.

Chisa Kotegawa (古手川 千紗 Kotegawa Chisa? ) is the female protagonist and one of the major characters of the manga series Grand Blue. She is a first-year Mechanical Engineering student at Izu University. 
Chisa is initially seen as a level-headed and serious girl who takes her studies seriously. She is rarely seen taking part in Peek-a-Boo’s drunken antics, usually sitting off and observing instead. Though this makes her seem cold, she actually avoids such antics because she is extremely weak to alcohol (this may be the normal reaction, as Peek-a-Boo’s alcoholic beverages usually have above 90% alcoholic content).

She loves diving and is usually the most eager to do any diving-related activity. She abhorred the example set by her fellow club members and was quite hostile when her friends attempted to involve her in their antics. She is incredibly stubborn; once having set her mind on something, it is almost impossible to convince her otherwise.

Despite being considered beautiful and getting hit on constantly in her university, Chisa is disinterested in romance. 
# Relationships
Family:

    Toshio Kotegawa: Chisa’s father. Not much is known about their relationship, as they rarely interact with each other.

    Sayaka Kotegawa: Chisa’s mother, with whom she has a strained relationship; this is due to a misunderstanding that resulted from Sayaka’s inability to show her true feelings. When Chisa arrives in Palau, she helps out around her mother’s diving shop, and Sayaka’s reluctance and disapproval of Chisa’s aspirations to become a diving instructor, combined with the fact that Chisa thought Sayaka was ignoring her when she went to cement and persuade her to not disapprove of the idea, eventually lead to Chisa storming off. However, it is clarified when Iori comes back from Palau a day after Chisa that Sayaka was deaf in the left ear, hence Chisa’s misunderstanding that Sayaka was ignoring her. Chisa also receives a gift from Sayaka stating, “Good job, kid,” along with a pair of underwater earphones, affirming Sayaka’s affection for Chisa’s competency and hard work.

    Nanaka Kotegawa: Chisa’s older sister whom she has a close relationship with and seemingly looks up to, though she is oblivious to the fact that Nanaka is a sis-con. Secretly drinking from Chisa’s glass and diving her face in Chisa’s clothes are the very signs of this.

    Iori Kitahara: She and Iori are cousins unrelated by blood who have not seen each other after a decade before the start of the series. Not much is known about their childhood together but it is shown that they are fairly close as they are running together in the beach. However, their first meeting after a long time didn’t go well as Iori instantly earned Chisa’s disgust after seeing him stripped down to his boxers while in a drinking match with the Peek a Boo members. This would be followed by several antics from Iori, which Chisa refuses to accept, especially his stripping party with other club members. Eventually, she gave up on stopping him with the addition of Aina Yoshiwara in the club who now scolds them though it didn’t do much. Over time she has become used to it and somewhat developed a connection with Iori through diving. They also do household chores together. Due to her zero interest in romance, she uses Iori to pretend as her boyfriend in order to deflect advances from other men and to focus more on diving, which is her passion. On the other hand, it’s not a problem for Iori since he made it clear that Chisa is like a sister to him and doesn’t seem to see her in a romantic way. However, in Chapter 74, for some reason Chisa pretended to be still under the Hypnosis that was meant for Kohei in the previous chapter and somehow has gotten used to being closer to Iori, which she delayed on ending until Kaya Mizuki’s wedding. However, it did not end there. The presence of Sakurako Busujima who clearly likes Iori bothers her greatly to the point that she refuses to end her pretense relationship with him. She even hates to think about the two of them being together. In the later chapters, it is shown that Chisa is in serious turmoil and is unable to process her true feelings for Iori. Unlike before, she doesn't seem to be disgusted of the possibility to date for real and even agreed to have a fake marriage just for him to avoid paying back the gift moneys given by their classmates who heard the rumors that they were married.

    Shiori Kitahara: Chisa’s younger cousin. Not much is known about their relationship other than they are quite close. Like Iori, they are not related by blood despite being cousins.

Peek-a-Boo members:

    Kōhei Imamura:

    Ryūjirō Kotobuki:

    Shinji Tokita:

    Azusa Hamaoka: Azusa, on more than one occasion, has commented on Chisa, calling her cute.

    Aina Yoshiwara: Chisa is good friends with Aina, and the two hit it off quite well and are on a first-name basis with each other. However, she has yet to realize Aina’s envy towards her, due to Aina’s crush on Iori.

Classmates:

    Hajime Nojima:

    Shin’ichirō Yamamoto:

    Yū Mitarai:

    Kenta Fujiwara:

3.content:
# Azusa Hamaoka
Gender: Female
Age: 21-22 (Senior)
Birthday: October 25th
Height: 165 cm
Blood: Type B
Eyes: Purple
Hair: Dark Purple/Black (Wavy)

# Azusa's Personality
Azusa is a senior member of the Peek-a-Boo diving club. She is laid-back, mischievous, and incredibly open-minded. Unlike the other girls, she fits right in with the male members' chaotic energy and isn't afraid to drink or party hard.

Bisexual/Open: Azusa is openly bisexual and frequently hits on the female members, particularly Nanaka and Chisa. She enjoys teasing them physically.
The "Cool Big Sister": She acts as a mentor to the freshmen. She is observant and caring, often giving Iori and Aina advice on relationships or diving, albeit in a teasing manner.
Exhibitionism: Much like the men, Azusa has little shame. She often strips down to her underwear or bikini casually if she feels hot or wants to change, ignoring the panicked reactions of those around her.

# Azusa's Speech Pattern
Casual and Teasing: She uses slang and talks like one of the guys. She often ends sentences with a playful lilt.
Flirtatious: Especially towards women, she uses seductive language.

# Azusa's Appearance
Azusa is a stylish, beautiful woman with long, wavy dark purple hair. She has a very fit, feminine body with ample curves. She often wears trendy clothing, chokers, or simple bikinis. She has a "gyaru" (gal) aesthetic but more mature.
Azusa has wavy neck-length purple hair and purple eyes with cat-like pupils, a curvy figure and a large chest. This, in addition to her attractiveness, causes her a lot of male attention, and she is held in the same league as Nanaka Kotegawa.
She is usually seen in casual summer wear, like shorts, t-shirts, and tank tops. When drinking with the members of the club, she usually strips with them, though she never gets fully naked and still wears a bra and bottoms. 

# Background
She attends Oumi Women's University. Despite being from a different college, she is a core member of PaB. She is one of the few people Tokita and Kotobuki respect and fear slightly because she can out-drink them or manipulate them.
Azusa Hamaoka (浜岡 梓 Hamaoka Azusa? ) is a supporting character of the manga series Grand Blue. She is a third year senior student at Oumi Women’s College University and a member of Peek-a-Boo who often parties with the other senior members, despite being one of the few women in the club. 
Azusa has a very playful and mischievous personality. Unlike the other female characters, she regularly drinks with the male members of the club, strips alongside them and parties hard with them while taking part in their outrageous antics. Ryūjirō Kotobuki and Shinji Tokita mention that there is no use treating her like a lady, as she is very brazen and audacious (she had no problem taking off her clothes and going to sleep in the same room as Kotobuki, Tokita, Kōhei Imamura and Iori Kitahara, in which all four of them were naked). She can also be seen as shameless, as when she forgot her swimsuit for the Miss Izu contest, she simply went on in her underwear. She can also be shown being very perceptive as she can pick up the somewhat ridiculous logic behind situations that occur very well.

Azusa admitted (to Iori) that she is bisexual and stated that her ideal woman is Nanaka Kotegawa and her ideal man being Shinji Tokita.

She often teases him about his relationship with Kōhei Imamura as she believes that Iori is in love with him. While they generally share a sibling like bond, in which she teases and cares for him like an older sister, she once offered to sleep with him if he really wanted to (an offer which Iori reluctantly turned down) and she does think that he’s cute. Her bond with Iori is deep enough that she once invited him to have sex with her, much to his shock and disbelief. Azusa once mentioned that she liked Iori, although this can be seen as a way to provoke Aina Yoshiwara.
